text.message: Why do you hate me Israeli/u.s. governments? Why do you target me? What have I done? Why do I offend you so much Donald Trump? Why do I offend you netanyahu?
Your jealous over what? I am in the worst possible position in life. Why do target the poor? Why? Answer me

I am a targeted individual on every online game I play. The u.s./isrzeli government has me blacklisted. Everybody hates me. I'm poor, nearly homeless, but I smile through everything and I think that's
Why they hate me.. I have joy and they don't.
Btw, I am white Christian. Hence my targeting. Changed my username as a mockery/experiment
